text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On one particular day leading up to the Fan
Fest...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A photo shoot?

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's the main event for the Fan Fest! We
want you to make an appearance no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like some organizers are going around
scouting Umamusume on campus.

text_block_list.name: Fan Fest Organizer
text_block_list.text:
As the photo shoot operates on a rotational
basis, we'll only need to borrow you for an hour.
More importantly, you can greet your fans!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The organizer appears to be brimming with
anticipation... But unfortunately, Agnes Tachyon
dislikes, above all else, anything that she deems a
waste of time.
choice_data_list: (I bet she's going to turn her down...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A photo shoot, eh? How utterly fascinating! Why
not? I accept your proposal!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What? What are you getting all surprised for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lo and behold, Agnes Tachyon chooses to
participate in the photo shoot during the Fan
Fest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the event organizer leaves, I ask her
out of curiosity why she agreed to the photo
shoot.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've become increasingly curious about the
powers that stem from factors like "enthusiasm"
and "passion."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's surprising that the science-loving Agnes
Tachyon would show such interest over emotional
things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I simply sensed potential from my own firsthand
observations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The extent of muscular exertion depends on
psychological as well as physiological factors. It
has been proven that motor performance is linked
to the level of activity in the cerebral cortex and
the central nervous system!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: nervous system!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The effect that a crowd's cheering has on a
person will depend on various psychological
factors. In the case of adolescent human females,
this relationship is proven to be statistically
significant, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whether or not the same conclusion can be made
about Umamusume... That is the aim of this study.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, in simpler terms, I plan on getting closer to
my fans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This is, of course, for the sake of my research.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's Agnes Tachyon for you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Fan Fest has come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A crowd of fans, enthralled by her appearance at
the Osaka Hai, flock over to the photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Your performance at the Osaka Hai was amazing!
I'll be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, I appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I'm seeing you in person! You're
the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: The pleasure is all mine! Ha-ha-ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I know it's for the sake of research, I
stand dumbfounded by the unfamiliar sight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eventually, the photo shoot comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Phew! That was somewhat exhausting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was able to gather plenty of observational data.
Chances like these are so hard to come by.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A sharp increase in respiration and heart rate,
dilated pupils... Each individual demonstrated all
of these responses, albeit to varying degrees.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I believe they see me as some sort of reward.
Heh, just fascinating. I wonder what else is in
store.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes. Very good. My number of guinea pigs
has increased. The fruit of one's labors, one could
say!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As to how she manages to always keep so true to
herself... it leaves me speechless.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Rest assured, you're still my number one
guinea pig.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I realize she's saying this out of consideration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, the events of this Fan Fest seem to
have stimulated her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was more tiring than I had thought!
choice_data_list: You seemed to have been enjoying yourself

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Did it seem that way? I guess I couldn't contain
myself over the idea of finding more test subjects.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's such a rare opportunity to be able to
observe people eliciting such emotional
responses up close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Upon laying their eyes on me, their respiration
and heart rates seemed to visibly fluctuate,
evidencing stimulation to their dopamine nervous
systems.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It would follow, then, that the more races I win,
the more their reward systems are stimulated. At
this rate, there might come a day where the
simple sight of me provokes tears.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... Dear me, how intriguing this
concept of fandom is.
choice_data_list: ...But how did you feel during the photo shoot?
...But how did you feel during the photo shoot?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I don't really imagine myself getting used to that
sort of thing, but it wasn't nearly as bad as I
imagined.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was... in subjective terms, and in every sense of
the word—bubbly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, in any case, it wasn't an unpleasant
experience. If anything, it was on the pleasant
side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though not in the way I imagined, it seems like
she found her own way to enjoy the photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She laughs abruptly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh! I remember now! "And if you gaze
long enough into an abyss, the abyss will gaze
back into you," or so it goes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, this is purely speculative, however...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There may come a day when I, too, could tear up
at the mere sound of their cheers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But if such a phenomenon directly correlates to
an improvement in speed, then it is a price I'm
willing to pay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears this Fan Fest has been extra
stimulating for Agnes Tachyon.
